subtitle: Every open attorney seat bleeds billable revenue, increases burnout on existing staff, and compounds client service risk.
takeaway_text: average revenue lost per unfilled associate position over a 97-day vacancy, based on 1,800 billable hours at midsize firm rates.
source: Source: Thomson Reuters Legal Market Report | @zetabotai

bars.label: Average Days to Fill Associate Role - 97
Firms Using Staffing Agencies as Backup - 54%
Associates Citing Workload in Exit Interviews - 41%
